entities.name: GFSAD30SAAFGIRCE
entities.description: NASA data product providing cropland extent data for South Asia, Afghanistan, and Iran for 2015 at 30m resolution

entities.name: CROPLAND EXTENT
entities.description: The spatial extent of land used for growing crops

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region covered by the GFSAD30SAAFGIRCE data product

entities.name: AFGHANISTAN
entities.description: Country covered by the GFSAD30SAAFGIRCE data product

entities.name: IRAN
entities.description: Country covered by the GFSAD30SAAFGIRCE data product

entities.name: POLICYMAKING
entities.description: The process of formulating policies, for which cropland extent monitoring is critical

entities.name: WATER SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The management of water resources to ensure long-term availability, studied using cropland data

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST (RF)
entities.description: A pixel-based supervised classifier used to retrieve cropland extent

entities.name: LANDSAT 8 OPERATIONAL LAND IMAGER (OLI)
entities.description: Satellite imaging data used as input for the Random Forest classifier

entities.name: SHUTTLE RADAR TOPOGRAPHY MISSION (SRTM)
entities.description: Data product used to derive elevation for cropland extent retrieval

entities.name: ELEVATION
entities.description: Topographic height derived from SRTM data used in the classification process
